args.Description: "Use whereDate for database-agnostic date comparison in show method"
args.Instruction: "Change where('tanggal', $tanggal) to whereDate('tanggal', $tanggal) in show method"
args.ReplacementContent:
"        // Ambil booking yang sudah ada (dipesan, pending, ditutup)
        $booked_jadwals = Jadwal::where('lapangan_id', $lapanganId)
            ->whereDate('tanggal', $tanggal)
            ->whereIn('status', ['pending', 'dipesan', 'ditutup'])
            ->get();"
args.TargetContent:
"        // Ambil booking yang sudah ada (dipesan, pending, ditutup)
        $booked_jadwals = Jadwal::where('lapangan_id', $lapanganId)
            ->where('tanggal', $tanggal)
            ->whereIn('status', ['pending', 'dipesan', 'ditutup'])
            ->get();"
